top_signals.title: Despite weakening yen, intervention may have to wait for right timing, analysts say
top_signals.summary: Japan's government is probably seeking effective timing — a moment when yen-buying pressure increases — to amplify its effect, some say.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cerebras stock gains on AMD partnership
top_signals.summary: Cerebras and AMD agreed to work together, pairing their technology for AI systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Modi Seeks to Calm Anger as India Protests Widen
top_signals.summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi made a fresh bid to calm mounting anger over examination paper leaks as students prepared nationwide protests on Friday, with demands growing for the education minister to step down.

top_signals.title: Trump Allies Eye SVB Review as New Path to Oust a Fed Governor - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Trump Allies Eye SVB Review as New Path to Oust a Fed Governor  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Volkswagen profits slump as it flags full-year revenue squeeze ahead of restructuring
top_signals.summary: German auto giant Volkswagen on Friday reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter profit and revised down its sales forecast for 2026.

top_signals.title: To succeed, the prime minister must get back to basics
top_signals.summary: The ruling coalition does not have the communication channels and coordination mechanisms that facilitate cooperation and success.
